jcr:content.jcr:description: Precision measurement instruments — CMM Systems, Profilometers & more | Lumina Noventis

hero_b2b.name: Hero B2B
hero_b2b.header: The Right Instrument for Every Tolerance
hero_b2b.description: Five product families. One calibration standard. Whether you're qualifying a medical implant or validating in-line semiconductor tolerances, we build the instrument for your process.

section_header.name: Section Header
section_header.heading: Built for the Measurements That Cannot Fail
section_header.subtitle: From coordinate measurement systems to color analysis platforms, every Lumina Noventis instrument ships with a traceable calibration certificate and full connectivity for Industry 4.0 integration.

item1.name: Card
item1.text:
DIMENSIONAL METROLOGY

SpectraLink Series

CMM Systems

Sub-micron coordinate measurement at production speed. Measurement uncertainty below 0.05 µm without cleanroom constraints.

  • ≤ 0.05 µm measurement uncertainty (ISO 10360-2)
  • IP67 rated · −10°C to +60°C operating range
  • OPC-UA, EtherNet/IP, MQTT connectivity

Explore CMM Systems

item2.name: Card
item2.text:
SURFACE METROLOGY

DataPilot SP Series

Optical Profilometers

Nanometer surface detail without contact or contamination. Confocal and white-light interferometry for wafers, optics, and medical implants.

  • 0.1 nm vertical resolution (confocal mode)
  • Scan area 0.3 mm × 0.3 mm up to 100 mm × 100 mm
  • ISO 25178 · ASME B46.1 compliant

Explore Profilometers

item3.name: Card
item3.text:
COLOR & LIGHT MEASUREMENT

ChromaSpec Series

Spectrophotometers

From color QC to optical coating analysis — one platform. Sphere, 45°/0°, and bidirectional measurement geometries in a single instrument family.

  • Spectral range 360 nm – 2500 nm (UV/VIS/NIR)
  • Wavelength accuracy ±0.3 nm
  • Geometries: d/8°, 45°/0°, 0°/45°

Explore Spectrophotometers

item4.name: Card
item4.text:
MECHANICAL TESTING

NovForce Series

Force & Torque Testers

Tensile, compression, peel, bend, and torque testing in a single modular platform. EN ISO 7500-1 accuracy Class 0.5.

  • Force range 0.1 mN – 100 kN (model dependent)
  • Accuracy class 0.5 per EN ISO 7500-1
  • FDA 21 CFR Part 11 · ISO 13485-ready

Explore Force & Torque Testers

item5.name: Card
item5.text:
DATA & INTEGRATION

Lumina Suite

Software Suite

One dashboard for every instrument on your floor. SPC dashboards, automatic deviation alerting, and audit-ready reporting.

  • Connectors: OPC-UA, MQTT, REST API, SAP/Oracle ERP modules
  • FDA 21 CFR Part 11 · EU Annex 11 · ISO/IEC 17025 report templates
  • On-premise, private cloud, or Lumina Cloud SaaS

Explore Software Suite

hero_b2b.name: Hero B2B
hero_b2b.header: SpectraLink 7000 Series: The CMM for the Factory Floor
hero_b2b.description: The SpectraLink 7000 eliminates the trade-off that has defined in-line metrology for two decades. 0.05µm measurement uncertainty. IP67-rated for harsh production environments. OPC-UA native for direct MES integration — all in a sensor that runs at line speed without warm-up time.

section_header.name: Section Header
section_header.eyebrow: BUILT ON 40 YEARS OF METROLOGY INNOVATION
section_header.heading: The Performance Specs Are Just the Beginning
section_header.subtitle: What separates a measurement instrument from a measurement system is what happens after the number is generated. Every Lumina Noventis product is built around four capabilities that make accuracy actionable.

item1.name: Card
item1.text:
OIML & ISO Traceable

Every calibration certificate is traceable to a national metrology institute. No exceptions. No self-certification.

item2.name: Card
item2.text:
Sub-Micron Accuracy

Measurement uncertainty below 0.1 µm across our full dimensional instrument range — verified in independent laboratory audits.

item3.name: Card
item3.text:
IIoT / Industry 4.0 Ready

OPC-UA, Profinet, and REST API output are standard on every instrument we ship. Not an add-on. Not a firmware upgrade.

item4.name: Card
item4.text:
Global Service Network

42 service centers in 30 countries. 4-hour average response time. 98.7% system uptime SLA for production-critical installations.

hero_b2b.name: Hero B2B
hero_b2b.description: Our application engineers have matched instruments to processes across 120+ countries and every major industry. Describe your tolerance, your environment, or your compliance requirement — and we’ll recommend the right system.
